title: True Value Score Algorithm (price/unit, ratings, brand trust, seasonal adj.)
description: Implement the True Value Score in lib/scoring/ (runs in offscreen document via ONNX Runtime Web). Inputs: scraped product data (P1.4) + Genome vector (P1.5). Scoring dimensions: price-per-unit normalisation, rating quality (count-weighted), brand-trust heuristic, seasonal price adjustment. Output: { trueValue: number 0–100, breakdown: Record<string, number> }. Target latency: < 500 ms per product on 50-product benchmark. Quantised (int8) ONNX model if ML path used; fallback to pure-JS heuristics (WebNN → WASM → JS). TDD for scoring logic with fixture data.
